items_verified.notes: onPointerDown.preventDefault() fully removed from both Acknowledge and Resolve buttons in AnomalyCard.tsx. Grep confirms 0 onPointerDown occurrences in apps/web/src/. onClick retains stopPropagation() correctly. No similar blocking patterns found.

FIXED: bg-muted fully replaced with bg-[var(--color-track)] in all progress bar contexts. --color-track defined in :root (rgba(255,255,255,0.08)) and html.light (rgba(0,0,0,0.08)). Verified 6 occurrences across ClusterHealthWidget, PodStatusWidget, NodeResourceBreakdown, progress.tsx, and page.tsx. No bg-muted remains in progress bar contexts.

PresenceBar.tsx redesigned with proper user avatars (h-8 w-8 rounded-full with accent bg), tooltip via HTML title attribute showing user name + current page, flex justify-between layout separating ONLINE badge from avatar list. Positioning confirmed non-overlapping.

FIXED: All text-emerald-400 occurrences fully replaced with text-[var(--color-status-healthy)] across LogTailWidget.tsx, PodStatusWidget.tsx, and ResourceChartsWidget.tsx. Grep confirms 0 text-emerald-400 in dashboard/widgets/. --color-status-healthy defined in both :root (#10b981) and html.light (#059669).

applyServerLayout guard correctly implemented in page.tsx: only applies server data when data.widgets exists, is an Array, and has length > 0. This prevents empty server response from overwriting locally-added widgets. addWidget uses crypto.randomUUID() for unique IDs, preventing collision with server-synced widgets.

localStorage key 'voyager-refresh-interval' confirmed. Interval options: 30s/1m/5m/15m/30m/1h — all 6 match spec exactly. LIVE pulse animation present (animate-pulse class on the dot element, conditional on isLive). All 6 widgets use useDashboardRefreshInterval() via DashboardRefreshContext. DashboardGrid wraps in DashboardRefreshProvider. SSR-safe hydration via useEffect. Default 5min is spec-compliant.

CheckCircle2 icon imported and rendered in Step 1 provider cards. Selected state: border-2 border-[var(--color-accent)] bg-[var(--color-accent)]/5 scale-[1.02]. CheckCircle2 opacity transition: span with transition-all duration-200, opacity 1 when selected, 0 otherwise. Unselected cards have correct hover states. AnimatePresence with motion.div handles step transitions at 0.22s.

general_observations: TypeScript: No type errors detected from code review. All new hooks/contexts properly typed with generics.
Performance: useCallback and useMemo used correctly in DashboardGrid. SSR-safe localStorage access via readFromStorage() pattern is correct.
Accessibility: RefreshIntervalSelector has aria-label, aria-expanded, aria-haspopup on trigger button, role=listbox on dropdown, role=option + aria-selected on items. Good WCAG compliance.
Both critical findings from Fix Loop 1 fully resolved. CSS variable token system consistent across all components.
Note: hover:bg-muted/50 remains in page.tsx lines 703/753 for interactive list item hover states — this is NOT a progress bar context and is acceptable UX behavior.
